mapper.select: /* selectSmnghdList */ SELECT MNHDKEY, MNHDNAM, MNHDLKY , MNHDDSC, HDUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME , CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER FROM ${schema}.SMNGHD WHERE HDUSEYN = 'Y'
/* selectMenukey */ SELECT ${schema}.FN_SY_MENUKEY() as MENUKEY from DUAL
mapper.insert: /* insertSmnuma */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.SMNUMA ( MENUKEY , MNHDKEY , MENUFID , MENUGBN , MENUNAM , MENUSEQ , MENULKY , PROGRID , PRGMURL , MNUSEYN , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{param.menukey}, #{param.mnhdkey}, #{param.menufid}, #{param.menugbn}, #{param.menunam}, #{param.menuseq}, #{param.menulky}, #{param.progrid}, #{param.prgmurl}, 'Y', date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* getMenuByRoleList */ SELECT CONCAT(SM.MENUKEY, SM.MNHDKEY) as ROWKEY, SM.MENUKEY, SM.MNHDKEY, SM.MENUFID , SM.MENUGBN, SM.MENUNAM, SM.MENUSEQ, SM.PROGRID , SM.PRGMURL, SR.ROLNMKY , CASE WHEN SR.MENUKEY IS NULL OR SR.RMUSEYN = 'N' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS STATE , SR.UPDTCHK FROM ${schema}.SMNUMA SM LEFT JOIN ${schema}.SROLMN SR ON SR.MENUKEY = SM.MENUKEY AND SR.ROLGKEY = #{param.rolgkey} WHERE SM.MNUSEYN = 'Y'
AND SM.MNHDKEY = #{param.mnhdkey}
/* selectRolnmky */ SELECT ${schema}.FN_SY_ROLNMKY() as ROLNMKY from DUAL

/* getWarehouseByRoleList */ SELECT CONCAT(IFNULL(SR.ROLGKEY,''), MW.WAREKEY) as ROWKEY , SR.ROLGKEY , MW.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , CASE WHEN SR.WAUSEYN = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS STATE , SR.CREDATE , SR.CRETIME , SR.CREUSER , SR.LMODATE , SR.LMOTIME , SR.LMOUSER , SR.UPDTCHK FROM ${schema}.MWARMA MW LEFT JOIN ${schema}.SROLWH SR ON SR.WAREKEY = MW.WAREKEY AND SR.ROLGKEY = #{param.rolgkey} ORDER BY MW.WAREKEY
mapper.insert: /* insertSrolgr */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.SROLGR ( ROLGKEY, ROLGNAM, ROLDESC, RLUSEYN, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES( #{param.rolgkey}, #{param.rolgnam}, #{param.roldesc}, 'Y', date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.update: /* updateSrolgr */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.SROLGR SET ROLGKEY = #{param.rolgkey}, ROLGNAM = #{param.rolgnam}, ROLDESC = #{param.roldesc}, RLUSEYN = #{param.rluseyn}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1 WHERE ROLGKEY = #{param.oldrlky} AND UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk}

/* saveSrolwh */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.SROLWH ( ROLGKEY , WAREKEY , WAUSEYN , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.rolgkey} , #{param.warekey} , 'Y' , date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') , date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} , date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') , date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE WAUSEYN = #{param.state} , LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') , LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') , LMOUSER = #{userData.useract} , UPDTCHK = #{param.updtchk} + 1

INSERT INTO ${schema}.SMNUBM ( USERKEY, USERACT, PROGRID, CREDATE , CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.userkey}, #{param.useract}, #{param.progrid}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{param.useract}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s') , #{param.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* syu05VehicleInitList */ SELECT MV.VEHICKY AS ROWKEY , MV.VEHICKY , MV.VHCSNAM , MV.VHCFNAM , MC1.COMCDTX AS DLVTYPE , MC2.COMCDTX AS VHCOPTY , MC3.COMCDTX AS VHCTYPE , MC4.COMCDTX AS VHCSTAT , MC5.COMCDTX AS VHCTNCD , MV.VHCMAXW , MV.VHCCAPA , MV.DRVERNM , MV.DRVERPH , MV.INBVHYN , MV.OUBVHYN , MV.POSCOYN , MV.VHCVRYN , MO.VOWNKEY , MO.VONAMLC , DATE_FORMAT(MV.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(MV.CRETIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(MV.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(MV.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(MV.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(MV.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER FROM PH_COMMON.MVHCMA MV INNER JOIN PH_COMMON.MVOWMA MO ON MV.VOWNKEY = MO.VOWNKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC1 ON MC1.COMCDKY = 'DLVTYPE' AND MC1.COMCDVL = MV.DLVTYPE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC2 ON MC2.COMCDKY = 'VHCOPTY' AND MC2.COMCDVL = MV.VHCOPTY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC3 ON MC3.COMCDKY = 'VHCTYPE' AND MC3.COMCDVL = MV.VHCTYPE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC4 ON MC4.COMCDKY = 'VHCSTAT' AND MC4.COMCDVL = MV.VHCSTAT INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC5 ON MC5.COMCDKY = 'VHCTNCD' AND MC5.COMCDVL = MV.VHCTNCD WHERE MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y'
AND (MV.PUBLCYN = 'Y' OR (MV.PUBLCYN = 'N' AND MV.DMWPLNM = #{param.subDomain}))
AND (MV.PUBLCYN = 'Y' OR (MV.PUBLCYN = 'N' AND MV.DMWPLNM = REPLACE(LOWER(#{userData.schema}), '_', '-')))
ORDER BY MO.VOWNKEY , MV.VEHICKY

/* selectInboundBarData */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_ORDER , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WR.RCVITST = 'RVCOMP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_ORDER , IFNULL(SUM(WR.SKUWEIG), 0) * 0.001 AS TOTAL_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WR.RCVITST = 'RVCOMP' THEN WR.SKUWEIG ELSE 0 END), 0) * 0.001 AS COMPLETE_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(WR.GROSSWG), 0) * 0.001 AS TOTAL_GROSS_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WR.RCVITST = 'RVCOMP' THEN WR.GROSSWG ELSE 0 END), 0) * 0.001 AS COMPLETE_GROSS_WEIGHT FROM ${schema}.WRCVIT WR WHERE WR.RCVDCDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')

/* selectInboundDoughnutList */ SELECT MD.DOCTYPE, MD.DOCTYNM, SUM(WR.SKUWEIG) AS SUM_WEIGHT FROM ${schema}.WRCVIT WR INNER JOIN ${schema}.WRCVHD WH ON WH.RCVDCKY = WR.RCVDCKY INNER JOIN ${schema}.MDOCMA MD ON WR.WAREKEY = MD.WAREKEY AND WH.DOCCATE = MD.DOCCATE AND WH.DOCTYPE = MD.DOCTYPE WHERE WR.RCVDCDT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY MD.DOCTYPE, MD.DOCTYNM;

/* selectOutboundBarData */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_ORDER , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WS.SHPITST = 'CMP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_ORDER , IFNULL(SUM(WS.SKUWEIG), 0) * 0.001 AS TOTAL_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WS.SHPITST = 'CMP' THEN WS.SKUWEIG ELSE 0 END), 0) * 0.001 AS COMPLETE_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(WS.GROSSWG), 0) * 0.001 AS TOTAL_GROSS_WEIGHT , IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN WS.SHPITST = 'CMP' THEN WS.GROSSWG ELSE 0 END), 0) * 0.001 AS COMPLETE_GROSS_WEIGHT FROM ${schema}.WSHPIT WS WHERE WS.SPEIDAT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')

/* selectOutboundDoughnutList */ SELECT MD.DOCTYPE, MD.DOCTYNM, SUM(WS.SKUWEIG) AS SUM_WEIGHT FROM ${schema}.WSHPIT WS INNER JOIN ${schema}.WSHPHD WH ON WH.SHPDCKY = WS.SHPDCKY INNER JOIN ${schema}.MDOCMA MD ON WS.WAREKEY = MD.WAREKEY AND WH.DOCCATE = MD.DOCCATE AND WH.DOCTYPE = MD.DOCTYPE WHERE WS.SPEIDAT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY MD.DOCTYPE, MD.DOCTYNM

/* "selectStayedYardBarData" */ WITH STAYED_YARD AS ( SELECT COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.WASNHD WA WHERE WA.ASNSTAT = 'CMP' AND WA.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS inb_stayed_this_month ,COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.WASNHD WA WHERE WA.ASNSTAT = 'CMP' AND WA.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS inb_stayed_last_month ,COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(WA.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.WASNHD WA WHERE WA.ASNSTAT = 'CMP' AND WA.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 3 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS inb_stayed_two_month_ago ,COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.OOUBHD OU WHERE OU.OBOSTAT = 'CMP' AND OU.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS oub_stayed_this_month ,COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.OOUBHD OU WHERE OU.OBOSTAT = 'CMP' AND OU.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS oub_stayed_last_month ,COALESCE((SELECT -1 * (ROUND(AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.EXTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))) - AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(STR_TO_DATE(IFNULL(OU.ENTTIME, '0'), '%H%i%s'))))) FROM ${schema}.OOUBHD OU WHERE OU.OBOSTAT = 'CMP' AND OU.ENTDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 3 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m%d') ), 0) AS oub_stayed_two_month_ago FROM DUAL ) SELECT SY.*, CASE WHEN IFNULL(SY.inb_stayed_last_month , 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN ifnull(SY.inb_stayed_this_month, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100 END ELSE ROUND((SY.inb_stayed_this_month - SY.inb_stayed_last_month)/ SY.inb_stayed_last_month * 100 ,2) END AS MONTH_OVER_MONTH_INB_RATE, CASE WHEN IFNULL(SY.oub_stayed_last_month , 0) = 0 THEN CASE WHEN ifnull(SY.oub_stayed_this_month, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100 END ELSE ROUND((SY.oub_stayed_this_month - SY.oub_stayed_last_month)/ SY.oub_stayed_last_month * 100,2) END AS MONTH_OVER_MONTH_OUB_RATE FROM STAYED_YARD SY

SELECT TW.RENAMLC , TI.REGIMOD , TI.DEMODNM , TI.DEMDADR , SUM(CASE WHEN TP.TPNSTAT IN ('PLAN', 'LOADING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as READY_TRANS , SUM(CASE WHEN TP.TPNSTAT IN ('START', 'UNLOADING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DRIVING_TRANS , SUM(CASE WHEN TP.TPNSTAT = 'FINISH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as COMPLETE_TRANS , CONCAT(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN TP.TPNSTAT IN ('START', 'UNLOADING', 'FINISH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CHAR), '/', COUNT(1)) AS RESULT
FROM ${schema}.TPLNHD TP INNER JOIN ${schema}.TPLNIT TI ON TI.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ( SELECT TW.*, MR.RENAMLC FROM ${schema}.TPWPWG TW INNER JOIN ${schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = TW.REGIKEY ) AS TW ON TP.VHPLNKY = TW.VHPLNKY AND TI.REGIMOD = TW.REGIKEY WHERE TP.VHPDATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY TW.RENAMLC , TI.REGIMOD , TI.DEMODNM , TI.DEMDADR

SELECT TW.RENAMLC, SUM(CASE WHEN TP.TPNSTAT = 'FINISH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "COMPLETE_TRANS" FROM ${schema}.TPLNHD TP INNER JOIN ( SELECT TW.*, MR.RENAMLC FROM ${schema}.TPWPWG TW INNER JOIN ${schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = TW.REGIKEY ) AS TW ON TP.VHPLNKY = TW.VHPLNKY WHERE TP.VHPDATE = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY TW.RENAMLC;

/* selectEquipmentTaskList */ SELECT WT.TOAREKY, ME.EQUINAM, MC.COMCDTX AS EQUTYPE, ME.EQUIPKY, MD.DOCCTNM, MA.AREANAM , IF(WT.TOAREKY IS NOT NULL, '작업중', '대기') AS TASKSTS FROM ${schema}.MEQUMA ME INNER JOIN ${schema}.MAREMA MA ON MA.WAREKEY = ME.WAREKEY AND MA.AREAKEY = ME.AREAKEY AND ARUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'EQUTYPE' AND MC.COMCDVL = ME.EQUTYPE LEFT JOIN ${schema}.WTAKIT WT ON ME.WAREKEY = WT.WAREKEY AND ME.AREAKEY = WT.TOAREKY AND ME.EQUIPKY = WT.EQUIPKY AND WT.TASKSTS IN ('OPERSTR') AND WT.CREDATE BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') LEFT JOIN ${schema}.MDOCMA MD ON WT.DOCCATE = MD.DOCCATE AND WT.DOCTYPE = MD.DOCTYPE GROUP BY WT.TOAREKY, ME.EQUINAM, MC.COMCDTX, ME.EQUIPKY, MD.DOCCTNM, MA.AREANAM ORDER BY MA.AREAKEY, ME.EQUIPKY
/* selectPrintsq */ SELECT ${schema}.FN_SY_PRINTSQ() AS PRINTSQ FROM DUAL
